description: Round toed, black casual shoes with blue accents, low top styling and central lace-upsHas a perforated upper with overlays, branding at the side and reinforced heel collarPadded tongue and inner, cushioned footbed with branding at the heelThick midsole with foxing at the forefootTough rubber outsole with wave patterned groovesWarranty: 3 months against manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
